markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-driven content creation services to Seel's marketing team for potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Seel is at the very beginning of their content marketing journey, with no existing strategy or content](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-powered content creation with human oversight, from strategy to publishing](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Typical engagement: 6-8 week strategy sprint ($20K), followed by 12-month contract ($9-15K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach combines AI workflows with high-caliber editorial team for quality assurance](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)

## Topics

### Seel's Current Marketing Situation

  - [Currently at "minus one" in terms of content strategy and creation](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [8-figure ARR achieved through sales-led, direct-to-customer approach](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Minimal inbound leads, primarily through Shopify presence](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Urgency driven by realistic revenue growth targets and need for content to support growth tactics](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)

### GrowthX's Content Creation Approach

  - [AI-driven workflows with human-in-the-loop components](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [End-to-end service: strategy, creation, imagery, staging, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Focus on editorial content layer (e.g., blogs, longer-form website content)](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Can create lead magnets (e.g., white papers) in 1-2 weeks, including design](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Team led by former TechCrunch editor-in-chief, supported by experienced managing directors and editors](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)

### GrowthX's Technology and Process

  - [Multiple AI workflows for research, brief development, and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [Combines public information with client-provided context](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [6-8 week strategy sprint to develop deep customer insights and content roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Ongoing collaboration via Slack, Notion, and Airtable for content coordination](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)

### Engagement Structure and Pricing

  - [Typical engagement: 2-month strategy sprint followed by 12-month agreement](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [Strategy sprint starts at $20K](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Ongoing monthly fee ranges from $9K to $15K, depending on needs](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [Primary contacts are managing directors and managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send SOW (Statement of Work) and sales deck to Seel team](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Seel to review materials and socialize with C-level executives for buy-in](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [Potential follow-up call to be scheduled after internal discussions](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Seel to provide information on key competitors for GrowthX to analyze opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/RBhyszQHYW4yx2zpDKL3bvEyznNXVyJy?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
